Bug: parseConfig crashes on empty input #42

Opened by @alice on 2024-01-15

Labels: bug, parser

Description

Calling parseConfig("") panics instead of returning an empty Config:

cfg, err := parseConfig("")
// panic: runtime error: index out of range [-1]

Expected: empty input should return Config{} with no error, or return ErrEmpty.

Steps to reproduce

  1. Install foo v3.2.1.
  2. Run the snippet above.
  3. Observe panic.

Environment

FieldValue
OSmacOS 14.2
Go1.22.0
foo3.2.1

@bob commented

Confirmed. Looking into it now. The fix is in parser.go:88 — the index check should be >= 0 not > 0.

Linked PRs

  • #43 fix(parser): guard empty input
